name: Na'vi Beach Night iPhone Flash
description: iPhone flash photo of Na'vi woman at beach at night, playful pose with arms up, wet bikini, tribal face paint
input_prompt: navi woman beach night iphone flash photo playful pose bikini

meta.aesthetic: casual snapshot, NOT portrait, NOT cinematic

subject.description: Na'vi female (real-world evolved humanoid), clearly adult, slim-curvy body with defined waist and soft feminine curves

skin.details: color: muted realistic blue; state: wet, reflecting harsh flash light

face.details: structure: Na'vi facial proportions; paint: vertical red tribal paint line from forehead down face; eyes: color: golden yellow, expression: direct eye contact; mouth: kissy lips, blowing a soft kiss
face.expression: playful kissy lips with direct eye contact

body.details: type: slim-curvy; waist: defined; hips: soft feminine curves; chest: naturally full; long Na'vi tail clearly visible behind legs, illuminated by flash

clothing.details: state: wet; fabric: slightly sheer, semi-transparent when wet; effect: subtle natural outline visible through fabric, non-graphic

pose_action.camera_relation: framing from upper thighs to head, about 3 meters distance
pose_action.description: playful standing pose with both arms raised, elbows bent outward, fists held close to cheeks
pose_action.dynamic_elements: shoulders: slightly lifted; torso: subtle twist emphasizing waist; hips: shifted slightly to one side; legs: one leg bearing weight, other relaxed; energy: playful, teasing, casual

background: faint silhouettes of people far in background
night sky with no visible stars

camera_technical.pov: another person casually taking the photo

realism_anchors: visible skin pores on blue skin
harsh flash lighting with dark falloff

ideogram.prompt: Raw iPhone flash photo of Na'vi woman with muted blue skin and golden yellow eyes at beach at night, vertical red tribal face paint, long dark braids, wet black bikini, playful pose with arms raised and kissy lips, harsh flash lighting with dark beach background

luma.motion_notes: Playful arm movement, tail sway, flash moment capture

reve.prompt: Candid photography in the style of beach party snapshots, Na'vi character with blue skin and tribal paint, iPhone flash against dark beach night, playful wet bikini moment

grok-imagine.prompt: iPhone flash photo Na'vi woman with blue skin golden eyes red tribal face paint, wet black bikini, playful pose arms raised at night beach, harsh flash lighting dark ocean background, casual snapshot

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A raw iPhone flash photo of an adult Na'vi female with a slim-curvy body at a public beach at night. Her skin is a muted realistic blue with visible pores and real skin texture, wet and reflecting the harsh flash light. Her face has Na'vi facial proportions with a vertical red tribal paint line running from her forehead down her face. Her eyes are golden yellow with direct eye contact at the camera, and she has kissy lips blowing a soft kiss. Her long dark thin braids are slightly messy and beach-worn. Her long Na'vi tail is clearly visible behind her legs, illuminated by the flash. She wears a wet black triangle bikini top that is slightly sheer when wet, and wet black bikini bottoms. She stands in a playful pose with both arms raised, elbows bent outward, and fists held close to her cheeks. Her shoulders are slightly lifted with a subtle torso twist emphasizing her waist. The background shows dark sand, black ocean, and faint silhouettes of people far away under a night sky. Harsh frontal iPhone flash creates bright illumination on the subject with dark background falloff. The image has iPhone noise, minor blur, and imperfect centering typical of casual snapshots. No CGI. No fantasy illustration. Realistic skin texture with visible pores.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Na'vi female adult with muted realistic blue skin and visible pores, wet from swimming, at beach at night. Golden yellow eyes, vertical red tribal face paint, kissy lips expression, long dark messy braids. Long Na'vi tail visible behind legs. Wearing wet black triangle bikini. Playful pose with arms raised, fists near cheeks, subtle torso twist. Dark beach background with black ocean. iPhone flash photography, harsh frontal light with dark falloff, casual snapshot aesthetic. Not CGI, not 3D render, not fantasy illustration.
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: An adult Na'vi female with muted realistic blue skin stands at a beach at night in a playful pose with both arms raised and fists near her cheeks. Her skin is wet with visible pores reflecting harsh flash light. She has golden yellow eyes, a vertical red tribal paint line on her face, and kissy lips. Long dark thin braids fall messily around her shoulders. Her long Na'vi tail is visible behind her legs. She wears a wet black triangle bikini. The background shows dark sand and black ocean with faint silhouettes in the distance. iPhone flash creates harsh frontal lighting against the dark beach. Casual snapshot aesthetic with typical smartphone imperfections.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the tribal face paint color from red to blue while keeping the Na'vi features, pose, bikini, and beach setting the same. Preserve the iPhone flash lighting and casual snapshot feel.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed Na'vi features (skin color, facial structure, tail), specific tribal paint placement
2_realism_anchors: 'visible pores on blue skin', 'wet skin reflecting flash', 'iPhone noise and imperfections'
3_technical_camera: 'iPhone normal mode', '24mm wide', specific imperfections (noise, blur, imperfect centering)
4_negative_hygiene: prevents portrait mode, cinematic, CGI, fantasy illustration
5_spatial_consistency: precise pose (arms raised, fists near cheeks, torso twist, hip shift)
6_lighting_storytelling: 'harsh frontal flash with dark falloff' = casual beach party snapshot
7_character_specificity: Na'vi species with all identifying features (blue skin, golden eyes, tail, braids)
